strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure development and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Strong architectural skills demonstrated through open-source contributions and scalable platform development
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework listed in the job requirements
Primary stack alignment is good, but secondary Kotlin/Java experience is not prominently featured in recent roles
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework despite proficiency in Jest and Playwright
response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack development skills with TypeScript and Node.js, along with specialized experience in AI-agent infrastructure that aligns well with emerging trends. However, her limited direct exposure to Nest.js—the primary backend framework specified—and the secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) may require onboarding support. Her architectural contributions to scalable platforms and open-source projects demonstrate depth of technical expertise.
